project_context.target_audience: Local customers in Patna seeking luxury, traditional, and high-end jewelry (Gold, Diamond, Silver, Bridal)

background.description: Deep, almost-black maroon/wine for a cinematic, royal feel. Never use pure black.

surface.description: Use rich maroon with subtle grain for cards, and glassmorphism for sticky headers.

text.description: Warm creams for readability. Metallic gold (#D4AF37) for highlights and primary CTA text.

border.description: Borders should always be a low-opacity gold to mimic metallic edges.

accent.description: Classic jewelry gold. WhatsApp button should retain brand green but styled elegantly.

rules.h1: text-5xl md:text-7xl font-light tracking-tighter leading-none text-[#FDFBF7]
rules.overline: text-xs md:text-sm uppercase tracking-[0.2em] font-medium text-[#D4AF37]

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Use generous padding: py-24 or py-32 for sections to give a breathable, editorial feel.

grid_system.collections: Mode A: 'Tetris' Grid (Bento). grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-6. Make Gold col-span-8 row-span-2, Bridal col-span-4 row-span-2, Diamond col-span-4, Silver col-span-8. Force asymmetry.
grid_system.general: Never center everything. Use asymmetric alignments for visual tension.

layout_and_spacing.hero_overlay: bg-black/50 or bg-gradient-to-t from-[#110A0C] via-black/40 to-black/20. Ensure background image breathes while text remains readable.
layout_and_spacing.glassmorphism: For sticky nav: backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#1C0F13]/70 border-b border-[#D4AF37]/20.

buttons.primary: bg-[#D4AF37] text-[#110A0C] hover:bg-[#C5A059] rounded-none px-8 py-4 transition-all duration-300
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#D4AF37] text-[#D4AF37] hover:bg-[#D4AF37]/10 rounded-none px-8 py-4 transition-all duration-300

cards.default: bg-[#2B171D] border border-[#D4AF37]/15 hover:border-[#D4AF37]/40 transition-all duration-500 overflow-hidden
cards.image_hover: Scale image by 1.05 on card hover using group-hover:scale-105 transition-transform duration-700 ease-out

forms.inputs: bg-[#1C0F13] border-b border-[#D4AF37]/30 border-t-0 border-l-0 border-r-0 rounded-none px-0 py-3 text-[#FDFBF7] focus:ring-0 focus:border-[#D4AF37] placeholder-[#D9C8B4]/50

hero.alt: South Asian woman in rich traditional bridal attire with intricate jewelry

diamond.alt: Exquisite diamond ring displayed on soft velvet

bridal.alt: Woman in red and gold traditional jewelry

hero_copy.heading: Crafting Legacy, One Jewel at a Time
hero_copy.subheading: Welcome to Abhushan Nirmata. Patna’s premier destination for exquisite Gold, Diamond, and Traditional Bridal collections.

owner_info.name: Anjan Kumar
owner_info.description: With a passion for intricate craftsmanship, Anjan Kumar curates collections that honor traditional Indian artistry while embracing modern luxury.

store_details.address: Rajabazar Pal Market opposite pillar no. 65, Bailey Road, Patna

technical_and_accessibility.icons: Use 'lucide-react' for all icons (Phone, MapPin, Clock, Instagram, Menu, X).
technical_and_accessibility.animations: Use framer-motion for slow, elegant reveal animations (y: 20 to 0, opacity 0 to 1, duration: 0.8s).
technical_and_accessibility.accessibility: Ensure all text against dark backgrounds passes APCA contrast checks. Add 'data-testid' to all interactive elements (e.g., data-testid='whatsapp-fab', data-testid='contact-submit').
technical_and_accessibility.whatsapp_integration: Implement a fixed floating action button (bottom-right) linking to WhatsApp (https://wa.me/919113777874) with a clean icon.
